RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 18 Release week : 31 Release year : 2023
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Resimulated ORCAS to SOMEIP CANoe conversion done
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW:3726 : [CONVERTOR TOOL] [STLA FLR4] Convert STLA Resimulated output file to Canoe

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 17 Release week : 31 Release year : 2023
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - BMWSP25 support added for vigem to SOMEIP CANoe conversion
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW:3711 : [CONVERTOR TOOL] [BMWSP25]Check the vigem to canoe conversion issues

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 16 Release week : 30 Release year : 2023
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Issue with canoe conversion for STLA vigem files fixed
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW:3646 : [STLA] [CONVERTER] Convert STLA VIGEM file to Canoe

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 15 Release week : 28 Release year : 2023
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - "Enable tag is removed from convertor tool config file.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW:3387 : [CONVERTOR_TOOL] Remove the "enable" from input and output tags in the config

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 14 Release week : 26 Release year : 2023
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Visual studio 19 support is added
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW:3393 : [CONVERTOR TOOL] Update to VS19

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 13 Release week : 14 Release year : 2023
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - FLR4 ethernet data support added in pcap to canoe conversion

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 12 Release week : 8 Release year : 2023
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Hanging issue for big size logs in pcap to orcas conversion fixed
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW:3130 : [CONVERTOR TOOL] Issues in pcap to orcas conversion

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 11 Release week : 4 Release year : 2023
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - PCAP to ORCAS issue for chunks loss resolved.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW:3095 : [MDF4_Converter_Tool] Chunks lost observed in PCAP to ORCAS conversion

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 10 Release week : 48 Release year : 2022
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - PCAP to ORCAS issue resolved.

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Linux build tested and working fine in main branch

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 19 Release year : 2022
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - issues with SOMEIP write fixed.

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 19 Release year : 2022
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - issues with SOMEIP write fixed.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-2545 [MDF4_Convertor _Tool] MUDP tool does not support log merging functionality for CANoe replay able output log

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 17 Release year : 2022
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Merging functionality added for vigem to canoe conversion
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-2545 [MDF4_Convertor _Tool] MUDP tool does not support log merging functionality for CANoe replay able output log

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 14 Release year : 2022
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - One more option added in config file for generating the output file next to SRR debug in a folder named CONV. This option is applicable only when remote pc log path is given as input in json.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-2541 [MDF4 Converter] No Output created, but processing time consumed CYW-2542 [MDF4 Converter] Issues when operating on non-local data

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 13 Release year : 2022
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - CAN Bus spec id 80 and 90 added for MAN.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-2539 [CONVERTOR_TOOL] Converted CANoe log not replayable in CANoe

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 10 Release year : 2022

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - PCAP to CANoe SOMEIP convertor and JSON file path made as an argument

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 16 Release year : 2021
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Sample count print done only in twice a second.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-1809 - [Resim Tools] Redraw counter only once per second

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 13 Release year : 2021
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Added more error messages in console in case of problems in config or json.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-1783: [MF4 Converter] Improve Error Handling

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 11 Release year : 2021
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Added a tag in cofig xml to ignore CDC while converting to ORCAS

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 10 Release year : 2021
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Mismatch in sample count between input and output issue resolved.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-1767: [CONVERTOR TOOL] Mismatch in sample count between input and converted output

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 10 Release year : 2021
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - merge the datas of respective streams to independent file.

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 9 Release year : 2021
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Refined config xml.

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Removed radar stream decoder and mudp decoder module.

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.MDF4_CONVERTOR_TOOL_Version: Major version: 3 Minor version: 3 Release week : 8 Release year : 2021

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: - Input of convertor tool changed from flist to json.
